crime.quote: if the detectives were successful in handing over the perpetrator

victim.quote: if they caught the thief and put a stop to the theft within their allotted two weeks

investigator.value: Keely and Parker - detective duo taking their first case
investigator.quote: After all, this is our first case, Park. This is our chance to show what we've got

red_herring.value: Melodie's voices presented as possibly imaginary by doctor, but she believes they're real this time
red_herring.quote: She knew, well, that's what the doctor told her, they were just imaginary, but now. She felt sure they were real

clue_fairness.value: Reader hears the same fragmentary voices and words ('Tony') that Melodie hears from below
clue_fairness.quote: Tony! She clearly heard him yell 'Tony.' And then her voice. Not so loud, but sharper.

social_world.value: Family betrayal dynamics - untrustworthy father figure (man of God), foster mother, older men with power over young woman
social_world.quote: if she couldn't even trust her own father, a man of God! Maybe all old men were like that. And her foster mother

investigator_wound.value: First-time detectives Keely and Parker taking their inaugural case with financial pressure and fear of failure
investigator_wound.quote: After all, this is our first case, Park. This is our chance to show what we've got

_meta.title: ebook c m albrecht the albemarle affair
